title: Re-express existing checks as default rules with [validation] aliases
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 8.3.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] Orphan-leaf, type-label, and strategic-label checks are expressed as default rules.
- [hard] Behavior is identical to today; parity covered by tests.
- [hard] Legacy [validation] config keys still work as aliases onto the rules.
